original: The Great Potato Incident: Minor league Williamsport Bills catcher Dave Bresnahan attempts to lure an opposing baserunner off third base using a potato carved to look like a baseball. Umpire calls runner safe, and the catcher is fined $50 and released by the team
19-year-old Indonesian boy is rescued after 49 days adrift when his floating fish trap becomes detached
Comet Howard-Koomur-Michels collides with Sun
A Pentium computer running Richard Lang's ChessGenius 2 program defeats world chess championGarry Kasparov

Foghorn Leghorn, a Warner Bros. cartoon character created by Robert McKimson and Warren Foster (Looney Tunes and Merrie Melodies series), debuts in "Walky Talky Hawky"
Indications that Neanderthals are the first to make glue out of tar are strengthened by research published in "Scientific Reports"

Stolen on August 22, 2004,Edvard Munch's famous painting "The Scream" is recovered from a raid by Norwegian police. The painting was said to be in a better-than-expected condition.

Henry VIbecomes King of England at the age of 8 months after the death of his father Henry V - youngest person to inherit the throne of England
